calendar.matters:
Petition To Confirm Trust Ownership Of Assets & To Modify Trust To Conform To The Trustor'S Intent
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lynn Searle for Thomas Carnes.

Ms. Searle confirmed that units 3 nor 5 had been conveyed to the Trust, that the deed was prepared early on shortly after the meeting with the Client, that they were working with a Real Estate Attorney and that the Attorney wanted to wait to record all of the deeds at the same time. In addition, Ms. Searle stated that they did not know that the 2 units were not in the Trust until Alice passed away, addressed the issue of Mr. Carnes capacity, and his understanding of what they discussed and what the petition was for. The Petition to Confirm Trust Ownership of Assets, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition To Confirm Trust Ownership Of Assets & To Modify Trust To Conform To The Trustor'S Intent
Off Calendar Aug-27-2012 Continued To Sep-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Confirm Trust Ownership Of Assets & To Modify Trust To Conform To The Trustor'S Intent
Off Calendar Aug-06-2012 Continued To Aug-27-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Lynn Searle for Thomas Carnes (Petitioner).

Counsel reported on the history of how the finance was handled by the mother and addressed the issues with regard to refinance/private loan of each of the units. The Court granted the Request to Modify Trust to allow Juliana to act as co-turstee. The Heggstad petition is continued to August 27, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 for further submission with respect to all prior dealings with each unit and why one is treated differently from the others.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
